mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM PIN_USR_MGT WHERE 1 = 1 AND DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} WITH UR
SELECT USER_BANKING_ID ,DEVICE_ID ,DEVICE_TYPE ,JOIN_FLAG ,USE_PIN_FLAG ,DEVICE_ID_UPDATE ,POPUP_STATUS ,NICK_NAME ,FINGER_LOGIN_FLAG FROM PIN_USR_MGT WHERE DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} WITH UR

UPDATE PIN_USR_MGT SET DEVICE_ID = #{afterDeviceId}, USER_BANKING_ID = #{userBankingId}, LAST_UPDATE_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND DEVICE_ID = #{beforeDeviceId} AND USER_BANKING_ID = #{userBankingId}
